copypastas.text: Hi Fl0m it’s me, your only viewer. For months I have created the illusion that you are streaming to a large audience. But here’s the truth: all the people in the chat are me. And now, for you to be convinced of this, I will send this message from all my accounts.

fl0m’s smile is like a sparkle bomb exploding in my heart 💥🥺✨ he’s lowkey the cutest little cinnamon roll with headshots 😳💖 pls protect him from bad sprays and sad feelings, he deserves all the hugs 🫶💞
fl0m your chat sucks, you have too many bots spamming in chat frfr nocap

🦍 🗣 GET IT TWISTED 🌪 , GAMBLE ✅ . PLEASE START GAMBLING 👍 . GAMBLING IS AN INVESTMENT 🎰 AND AN INVESTMENT ONLY 👍 . YOU WILL PROFIT 💰 , YOU WILL WIN ❗ ️. YOU WILL DO ALL OF THAT 💯 , YOU UNDERSTAND ⁉ ️ YOU WILL BECOME A BILLIONAIRE 💵 📈 AND REBUILD YOUR FUCKING LIFE 🤯
chat can you remember even 1 of fl0ms 16 kills? like none of them had impact to the round. hes just stat padding to make his stream look good. i cant believe yall fall for this
FLOM why you dont call smii7y and yall make a quick live

FL0m’s beard is like a fluffy little guardian angel that helps him spray those bullets straight to my heart 💘🎯 Every time he streams, I’m over here blushing harder than a flashbang... like, how can someone be so good at CS2 and have a beard that cute? Teach me your beard magic, FL0m, I’m hopelessly hooked! 😩💖
🦋 Squid1 Squid2 Squid3 is this henti?
A POP BLABBERING B POP BLABBERING HERE POP BLABBERING THERE POP BLABBERING WHERE IS THE TIDDY POP peepoDemand
